narrative:
Precinct Norwalk 1-B (precinct in Huron County) has 1,187 registered voters, with 56.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.7%, a modest Republican lean of 3.8 percentage points.
